evals.prompt: Set up project context for this repo from existing files, then ask me only for missing details before saving.
evals.expected_output: Creates `.agents/project-context.md` using the full template, asks targeted follow-ups for missing sections, and keeps unknowns as TBD.
expectations: Uses question tool for missing information
Includes Tools and Source of Truth section

evals.prompt: I already have a project context file. Update only the risks and tools sections, then show what changed.
evals.expected_output: Reads existing context, limits edits to requested sections, and returns concise diff/update summary.
expectations: Asks adjustment question via question tool

evals.prompt: Start from scratch and walk me through context section by section. Do not ask everything at once.
evals.expected_output: Runs conversational, section-by-section intake with targeted follow-ups and confirmation before moving on.
expectations: Asks one section at a time
